title: Kaggle - Google Gemini Long Context Window Competition
snippet: Recent Kaggle competition using Gemini's 2M-token context window for document Q&A. Free GPU notebooks, cash prizes, runs through Q3 2026.

title: EleutherAI - GPT-NeoX-20B Open Weights Release
snippet: Open-weights 20B parameter language model release with inference notebooks and a free Hugging Face inference endpoint quota.

title: GitHub - nanoMoE: Minimal Mixture-of-Experts in PyTorch
snippet: Educational 50-line PyTorch implementation of a mixture-of-experts layer with a Colab walkthrough. MIT-licensed, free to use.

title: Stanford CS336 - Language Modeling From Scratch (Spring 2026)
snippet: New Stanford course on building LLMs from the tokenizer up. Lecture videos and problem sets freely available; runs parallel to CS224n.

title: MIT 6.S184 - Generative AI Flow (IAP 2026)
snippet: MIT's new three-week IAP course on diffusion flow-matching and rectified flow models. Free lecture notes, problem sets, and a final project gallery.

title: Hugging Face Spaces - Free Whisper Transcription Demo
snippet: Official OpenAI Whisper Space running on free HF GPU. No signup required for short audio clips; great for speech recognition practice.

title: DeepLearning.AI - Building Evaluations for LLM Applications
snippet: New 90-minute short course on building offline + LLM-as-judge evals. Free with a free account; pairs with the agents course.

title: Anthropic - Free Claude API Credits for Students (Pilot)
snippet: Limited pilot program: verified university students get a small monthly Claude API credit. Email-domain verification required.

title: Modal - Free $30 Monthly GPU Credit (Verified Students)
snippet: Modal gives verified students a recurring monthly GPU credit for A10G / H100 jobs. .edu email required; ideal for fine-tuning labs.

title: Papers with Code - Trending Benchmarks June 2026
snippet: Aggregator of SOTA results across ML benchmarks. Free, community-driven, with code links and dataset cards for every leaderboard entry.

title: Kaggle - AI Agents Intensive Capstone Track (Companion)
snippet: Companion Kaggle micro-course for the 5-day Agents Intensive: 5 lessons, 5 codelabs, and a final capstone project template.

title: arXiv - Recent Survey on Small Language Models (June 2026)
snippet: Survey of small (<3B parameter) language models with training recipes, evaluation suites, and deployment tips. Open-access PDF.

title: Google Cloud - Free Generative AI Studio for Students
snippet: Google for Education: free Vertex AI and Generative AI Studio credits for verified students. Includes Gemini Pro and Embeddings quotas.

title: Modal Blog - Free Stable Diffusion XL Fine-Tuning Recipe
snippet: Open walkthrough of fine-tuning SDXL on a custom dataset using Modal's free student tier. Includes dataset prep and evaluation notebook.

title: Hugging Face - Smol Course v2 (Compact Language Models)
snippet: New release of the smol-course covering SmolLM3 and post-training alignment. Free on GitHub, runs on Colab free tier GPUs.
